title: eragrostis tef
intro: Eragrostis tef, also known as teff, is a small grass-like annual plant native to the highlands of Ethiopia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of teff include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing essential nutrients such as iron, calcium, and fiber. Teff is often prepared as a tea, flour, or supplement, and can also be used in traditional herbal remedies, such as infusions and decoctions.
